svg.title: usesteady: diverged filesystem → refusal
svg.desc: UseSteady survivability demo: 02-diverged-fs — animated terminal recording rendered as deterministic SVG. Reproduce: node scripts/p2-render-demo-assets.mjs
svg.text: File note: If CHANGELOG.md already exists, the operation will fail (target_exists).
File note: If VERSION already exists, the operation will fail (target_exists).
$ # === Workspace state diverges from the token ===
$ # (someone deleted CHANGELOG.md outside the workflow — token says it's done)
$ # Resume must refuse because verification fails:
Resume refused: workspace state diverged from token.
1 task(s) cannot be verified as already-done.
→ task_state_diverged: expected CHANGELOG.md to exist (per completed token) but it is missing
No execution occurred. No tasks ran. No workspace changes.
